feedbacks.name: Initial Tester
feedbacks.comment: This dashboard workspace is super fast and beautiful! Loving the HSL Color Labs interactive tool.

tools.name: Vector Graph
tools.desc: An endless grid designed for exact geometry calculations. Plot custom vector coordinates, evaluate intersecting nodes, design custom shapes, and visualize complex polygons instantly.

tools.name: Color Visualizer
tools.desc: Deep HSL spectrum explorer. Calibrate Hue angles, modify saturation gradients, control alpha opacity channels, compute harmonies, evaluate luminance ratios, and copy code payloads instantly.

tools.name: Hop Square
tools.desc: Interact with physics bounds, gravitational values, and kinetic speeds inside this cosmic interactive game suite. Bounce off polygons and evaluate vector jump curves.
